---
title: "About"
---

This Quarto website is a static replacement for the BIOS 2010 learnr/Shiny lab tutorials.

The goal is for students to complete the labs in a browser without installing R and without using a Shiny server. The converted pages use WebR through `quarto-live` for runnable R code cells, and local quiz feedback replaces the original learnr quiz checking.

Migration notes and remaining work are tracked in [MIGRATION_TODO.md](MIGRATION_TODO.md).
